measurement_note: Size is C = m * n, the number of grid cells, across legal 2-by-1, 2-by-2, and 3-by-3 grids. Resident counts are saturated to exercise the ternary frontier and both remaining-count dimensions. The Accepted base-three profile DP and an independent precomputed-interaction profile DP take O(r c 3^c (I+1)(E+1)) time. A correct tuple-frontier implementation that reconstructs positional neighbors through c repeated full frontier scans per state takes an additional factor of c^2, completes all 2/4/9-cell tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
